after: Merge policy consumes structured review/QA JSON, QA compares against clean baseline, and KB fixes include executable applicability/test/rollback templates.
before: Merge policy inferred QA state from prose and old failures; KB records were passive notes.
summary: 自主维护循环在自动合并前需要结构化的 employee 契约、干净基线和可执行的修复模板。
